title: Enhancing efficiency, HUMI to purchase 2 tugboats for IDR 22.5 billion
body: PT Humpuss Maritim Internasional Tbk (HUMI), a subsidiary of PT Humpuss Intermoda Transportasi Tbk (HITS) engaged in marine transportation sector, has reportedly acquired 2 units of tugboats.

title: One year after IPO, RSCH shares soared 169%
body: The share performance of PT Charlie Hospital Semarang Tbk (RSCH) shot up 169.5% a year after its debut on the capital market on August 28, 2023

title: Promising prospect, AKRA proceeds with Eastern Indonesia expansion
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) proceeds with its business expansion plan to Eastern Indonesia in order to promote business growth within the next few years.

title: Ending the week, JCI opened strong
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was gaining strides from the opening bell until 11.25 AM WIB today (30/8) to 7,661.28. This uptrend resembled the pattern seen at yesterday’s (29/8) opening.

title: Corporate credit performed well, BNI revises credit growth target to 12% in 2024
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) reported high performance of its credit disbursement until the first half (H1) of 2024, reaching IDR 727 trillion or up 11% year-on-year (yoy).

title: Enhancing efficiency, HUMI to purchase 2 tugboats for IDR 22.5 billion
body: PT Humpuss Maritim Internasional Tbk (HUMI), a subsidiary of PT Humpuss Intermoda Transportasi Tbk (HITS) engaged in marine transportation sector, has reportedly acquired 2 units of tugboats.

title: One year after IPO, RSCH shares soared 169%
body: The share performance of PT Charlie Hospital Semarang Tbk (RSCH) shot up 169.5% a year after its debut on the capital market on August 28, 2023

title: Promising prospect, AKRA proceeds with Eastern Indonesia expansion
body: PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA) proceeds with its business expansion plan to Eastern Indonesia in order to promote business growth within the next few years.

title: Ending the week, JCI opened strong
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) was gaining strides from the opening bell until 11.25 AM WIB today (30/8) to 7,661.28. This uptrend resembled the pattern seen at yesterday’s (29/8) opening.

title: Corporate credit performed well, BNI revises credit growth target to 12% in 2024
body: PT Bank Negara Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBNI) reported high performance of its credit disbursement until the first half (H1) of 2024, reaching IDR 727 trillion or up 11% year-on-year (yoy).

title: RR Capital Group acquires 78 million shares of Panca Global Kapital (PEGE)
body: Tuesday, August 27, saw the addition of 78.40 million shares of PT Panca Global Kapital Tbk (PEGE) by foreign investor RR Capital Group Pte Ltd. This Singaporean investor now owns about 21.81% of the shares, up from 19.04% previously. Additionally, PT Arthakencana Rayatama once again acquired 14.21 million shares in the fuel distributor PT AKR Corporindo Tbk (AKRA), bringing its total ownership of shares to approximately 14.59%.

title: Broke the records, yet JCI closed weak
body: Despite the success in breaking another record at morning session, Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) slipped at today’s (29/8) closing bell.

title: Bank Jago targets NIM to reach 7% at the end of 2024
body: PT Bank Jago Tbk (ARTO) is targeting net interest margin in H2 2024 to arrive at 7%, relatively stable compared to 7.3% seen in H1 2024.

title: Gojek Tokopedia shares drives foreign volume plunges to -254.03 million shares
body: Foreign investors sold the most shares in the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), totaling 714.39 million shares with a net volume of -328.42 million shares on Wednesday, August 28. These sales contributed to a rise in foreign sales volume, which totaled 2.44 billion shares. Meanwhile, the foreign buying volume was 2.18 billion shares, causing net foreign volume to drop to -254.03 million shares.

title: The Twinwood Family acquires one billion more shares, taking control over Sampoerna Agro (SGRO)
body: On Monday, August 26, as many as 1.02 billion shares of PT Sampoerna Agro Tbk (SGRO) were added by foreign investor Twinwood Family Holdings SFO Limited to its portfolio. After the most recent deal, which was directed by PT Bank HSBC Indonesia, the investor from the United Arab Emirates, who had previously owned about 13.29% of the shares, saw its share portion soar to 69.68%. Currently, Twinwood holds a majority stake in this plantation company that runs both palm and non-palm plantations.

title: Surya Semesta Internusa raises marketing target three times, eyeing 182% net profit surge
body: Noticing promising prospect for its industrial area, PT Surya Semesta Internusa Tbk (SSIA), a property, construction, and hospitality company, has raised marketing target for Suryacipta City of Industry, Karawang, and Subang Smartpolitan for 2024.

title: Low Tuck Kwong transferred shares to Elaine Low
body: Dato Low Tuck Kwong, the founder and shareholder of PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN), reportedly transferred 22% of his shares to Elaine Low, his daughter.

title: Hermina to increase capacity of IKN hospital
body: PT Hermina Medikaloka Tbk (HEAL), a healthcare provider, is preparing for additional facilities for its newly operating Hermina Hospital in Nusantara Capital City (IKN).

title: NETV to set up reverse stock and private placement
body: PT Net Visi Media Tbk (NETV) will conduct two corporate actions at once: reverse stock split and private placement, in order to strengthen its capital structure.

title: ASRI confident of marketing sales target of IDR 2.8 trillion
body: PT Alam Sutera Tbk (ASRI) is optimistic that is will be able to secure marketing sales of IDR 2.8 trillion until the end of this year following realised marketing sales of IDR 1.2 trillion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Remain optimistic, Waskita Beton eyes new contracts worth IDR 7.48 trillion in 2024
body: PT Waskita Karya Beton Tbk (WTON) recorded new contracts of IDR 3.36 trillion until July (7M) 2024, aligning with its new contract target until December 2024 of IDR 7.48 trillion.

title: GGRM: Cigarette promotion fails to boost sales
body: Massive promotion of processed tobacco products is deemed insignificant in boosting sales of PT Gudang Garam Tbk (GGRM).

title: BBRI pushes for user increase and seeks new growth engine
body: PT Bank Rakyat Indonesia (Persero) Tbk (BBRI) is preparing several strategies to attain sustainable business growth, starting from boosting the number of users and securing new growth engine.

title: Geopolitical tension, SMSM revises sales growth target to 2%
body: PT Selamat Sempurna Tbk (SMSM) decides to revise the target of its sales growth for 2024 down to 2% from the initial target set to 8%.

title: TAPG secures extra credit limit of IDR 300 billion from Bank OCBC NISP
body: PT Triputra Agro Persada Tbk (TAPG) has obtained an extension to its investment credit limit from PT Bank OCBC NISP Tbk (NISP) worth IDR 300 billion.

title: FILM to hold a private placement to enhance capital structure
body: PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM), an entertainment and film production house, plans to issue 951.12 million new shares without pre-emptive rights, or private placement.

title: BCA Expoversary promotes consumer credit growth in H1 2024
body: PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA) booked growth of distributed credit of 15.5% year-on-year (yoy) throughout the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Coal reserves increase, ITMG eyes production of 20.2 million ton this year
body: PT Indo Tambangraya Megah Tbk (ITMG) announces positive result from the latest audit on its coal reserves and resources in several of its mines located in eastern Kalimantan.

title: Sudden uptrend, JCI broke another record
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) arrived at 7,658.88 at today’s (28/8) closing bell, breaking another record. This surge is entailed with increases in other indices in the stock exchange.

title: Foreign sell volume increased, net foreign closed at -749.95 million shares
body: Foreign sell volume surged on Tuesday, August 27, reaching 2.42 billion shares, while the foreign buy volume was merely 1.67 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume finished at -749.95 million shares. On the share purchase list, the aerosol services company PT Estee Gold Feet Tbk (EURO) had the most shares purchased, totaling 57.04 million shares with a net volume of 53.30 million shares.

title: TOWR confident of scoring 6% growth in revenue
body: PT Sarana Menara Nusantara Tbk (TOWR) maintains projected revenue growth of 4-6% in 2024. In 2023, its revenue increased 6.38% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 11.74 trillion from IDR 11.03 trillion in 2022.

title: Concluding private placement, PANI’s landbank grew to 1,850 hectares
body: PT Pantai Indah Kapuk 2 Tbk (PANI), a property developer, now records landbank of 1,850 hectares after conducting a private placement.

title: SIDO plans export expansion to Vietnam in second half
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO), more popularly known as Sido Muncul, reported fantastic growth in exports by up to 73% year-on-year (yoy) in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: 3.4 billion Bank Permata shares released by Bangkok Bank (BNLI)
body: On Friday, August 23, Bangkok Bank Public Company Limited released more than 3.47 billion shares of PT Bank Permata Tbk (BNLI), a banking company. Previously holding 98.71% of the shares, this foreign investor from Thailand is Bank Permata's controller. But as a result of the most recent transaction made through PT Mandiri Sekuritas, its share portion is now only 89.12%.

title: Adhi Karya secured new contracts of IDR 12 trillion until July 2024
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI), a state-owned building construction company, managed to record new contracts worth IDR 12 trillion until July 2024.

title: Revenue slumped, TOPS suffers another loss in first half
body: PT Totalindo Eka Persada Tbk (TOPS), a building construction issuer, only posted revenue of IDR 42 billion in the first semester (1H) 2024.

title: DMAS optimistic in achieving pre-sales target
body: PT Puradelta Lestari Tbk (DMAS), developer of the Delta Mas Industrial Area, is optimistic about achieving its marketing sales target of IDR 1.81 trillion by the end of 2024.

title: Back to core business, PTPP intensifies asset divestment
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) plans to divest its subsidiary's share assets this year to support its strategy to refocus on its core business line, namely construction.

title: Volume of foreign buy and sell differ slightly, net foreign volume closed at -70.72 million shares
body: On Monday, August 26, foreign investors' share buying and selling activities resulted in relatively similar foreign purchasing and selling volumes. Foreign buying volume stood at 2.04 billion shares, while foreign selling volume hovered around 2.11 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume finished at -70.72 million shares.

title: New contracts slipped in August, PTPP still on for IDR 32 T this year
body: PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) recorded new contracts of IDR 17.4 trillion until August (8M) 2024, down from IDR 22.56 trillion recorded in 8M 2023.
